text:
CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No other imaging services (revenue code not 040x) 
1 = Yes other imaging services (revenue code 040x) 

COMMENT: This field is derived by checking for revenue center code 040X on any of the claim records included in 
the stay.
